description: A dark graphic showing three darkened, faded booking-style portraits of men across the top. Large white text reads '3 out of 4', followed by 'MURDER DEFENDANTS IN FAIRFAX COUNTY ARE', and a red band reading 'ILLEGAL ALIENS'. A small DHS seal is at the bottom.
notable_text: 3 out of 4; MURDER DEFENDANTS IN FAIRFAX COUNTY ARE; ILLEGAL ALIENS
